blocks: {{COMPANY}} company name from HQ.md {{GENERATED_AT}} e.g. "2026-07-21 08:14" - HQ timezone, never UTC {{TIMEZONE}} e.g. "America/New_York (EST/EDT)" from HQ.md {{FRESHNESS}} one line: how fresh the record is (last session open/close line) :root palette overwrite the five --wf-* values from company/design/design-system.md; if design-system is (not set yet), leave these neutral defaults as shipped.
  • per recommended action (1-3), most important first
  • per QUEUED-with-no-DECIDED line, oldest first, or the empty note one
    per Active department
  • per Blocked row, oldest first, or the empty note
  • per open outcome, or the empty note
  • per recent outbox .html, newest first, or the empty note ACTIVITY_DATA replace the empty array with one object per audit-log.md line {date,time,type,owner,scope,what,pointer} - newest first. Everything below runs over that array client-side; no network. --> {{COMPANY}} - dashboard

    {{COMPANY}}

    Company dashboard - generated {{GENERATED_AT}} {{TIMEZONE}}. {{FRESHNESS}}
    Refresh any time by saying werkforce, status. This page is regenerated whole - never hand-edited, never a source of truth.

    Recommended next actions

    Waiting on you

    0 decisions in the queue - only you can move these.

    Department boards

    Open outcomes

    Recent deliverables

    Activity feed

      No activity matches these filters.
      Every number on this page was counted this run from the HQ files; judgment lines are marked. To refresh, say werkforce, status. This is a generated view - the record lives in the markdown files, and any hand-edit here is overwritten on the next run.
